title: Help roadmap overview
text: The HELP roadmap is to evolve from static help files into a live searchable support system for the app. The final version should explain blocks, list commands, show examples, and help debug common failures.
short_answer: HELP should become a live manual, command guide, and troubleshooting assistant.

title: Phase 1 static help
text: Phase 1 creates clean folders and JSON help files. The goal is to organize topics clearly before adding smarter behavior.
short_answer: Phase 1 creates clean help folders and JSON files.
goals: Create APP, RUNTIME, SCRIPTS, and INFO folders.
Add JSON help items with aliases, tags, examples, and related topics.

title: Phase 2 searchable help
text: Phase 2 connects the help files to the assistant search path so user questions can retrieve the right help item by aliases, tags, title, or text.
short_answer: Phase 2 makes HELP searchable by the assistant.
goals: Search by alias, title, tags, and text.
Use related topics for follow-up suggestions.

title: Phase 3 command-aware help
text: Phase 3 makes HELP aware of real commands. It should not only explain a block, but also show what the user can say or run right now.
short_answer: Phase 3 connects HELP to real commands and examples.
goals: Connect help topics with command examples.
Separate explanation from executable command usage.
Keep examples updated with real working commands.

title: Phase 4 troubleshooting assistant
text: Phase 4 turns HELP into a mini support system. It should guide the user through common failures using checklists, runtime file hints, logs, and test scripts.
short_answer: Phase 4 makes HELP useful for debugging the app.
goals: Recommend the smallest safe next test.
